methodology_note: v2.1 NFRs derive from FMEA-early + data_flows + FR budgets per METHODOLOGY-CORRECTION.md §2 Pass 2. Every entry carries derived_from (discriminated union). Orphan v2 NFRs (no derivable upstream) are NOT carried forward.

nfrs.text: The system shall refuse to emit a Draft Spec (DE.03) that contains any citation not grounded in retrieved DOCUMENTATION SOURCES (DE.09).
nfrs.rationale: FM.01 rpn=12 — spec generation hallucinating unsupported citations breaches EC10 citation-floor. Mitigation M1/M2 promoted to NFR.

nfrs.text: The system shall block OR.1 gate firing unless the Compliance Policy (DE.14) digest hash matches the version pinned at spec creation time.
nfrs.rationale: FM.02 rpn=8 — approval without policy check risks SOC2/HIPAA/GDPR breach. Hard gate mitigation promoted.

nfrs.text: The system shall bind every Approved Spec (DE.05) handoff to a content-addressed spec_id+version; F.4 shall refuse consumption when the received envelope's hash does not match.
nfrs.rationale: FM.03 rpn=6 — async retry on IF.03 causes F.4 to emit from stale DE.05. Content-addressing mitigation.

nfrs.text: The system shall cap the Observability Adapter's measured overhead on the customer system at MAX_CUSTOMER_SYSTEM_OVERHEAD_PCT and refuse to start when self-metered overhead exceeds that budget.
nfrs.rationale: FM.04 rpn=12 — UC11 non-invasiveness hard-constraint. Self-metering mitigation. Value preserved from v2 constant (FMEA confirms 2%).

nfrs.text: The system shall emit explicit gap markers in the Metric Stream (DE.08) when ingest heartbeat is absent for more than one RECOMMENDATION_CADENCE_MIN window, and F.6 shall refuse to recommend on stale windows.
nfrs.rationale: FM.05 rpn=12 — silent metric loss drives F.6 into wrong-answer mode. Heartbeat+gap mitigation promoted.

nfrs.text: The system shall complete every F.6 → F.7 recommendation cycle within RECOMMENDATION_CADENCE_MIN, applying bounded-queue shed-load at F.6 output when the queue saturates.
nfrs.rationale: FM.06 rpn=9 — cadence breach realizes Module-4 open question as incident. Backpressure mitigation.

nfrs.text: The system shall cause F.7 to fail-closed on any traceback event whose citation chain is incomplete (any unresolved DE.09 reference).
nfrs.rationale: FM.07 rpn=9 — fallback to unanchored LLM completion defeats auditability. Fail-closed mitigation.

nfrs.text: The system shall bind Session Token (DE.12) claims to the project_id scope and enforce that binding at every F.N entry via CC.R01.
nfrs.rationale: FM.08 rpn=8 — cross-tenant replay is a severe compliance event. Scope-binding mitigation.

nfrs.text: The system shall apply a deny-list redaction pass at F.4 exit so the CLI Bundle (DE.06) and Spec Commit (DE.15) never contain raw credential material; DE.07 payloads shall carry credentials_ref handles only.
nfrs.rationale: FM.09 rpn=8 — secret leakage via IDE consumers. Redaction + handle-only schema mitigations.

nfrs.text: The system shall enforce a lint rule on ffbd.v1 that every state-mutating function declares CC.R02 in its source_cc, causing the build to fail when a state-mutating F.N is added without an audit wrapping.
nfrs.rationale: FM.10 rpn=6 — audit-gap risk on schema-lock evolution. EC18 retention promise.

nfrs.text: The system shall version-tag every spec change that incorporates a Design Recommendation (DE.10) with the triggering recommendation_id in the spec's lineage.
nfrs.rationale: FM.11 rpn=9 — silent spec mutation under founders erodes trust + auditability. Versioning mitigation.

nfrs.text: The system shall route LLM Completion (DE.13) requests through a multi-provider adapter with circuit breaker; on single-provider outage the breaker shall fail over within LLM_PROVIDER_TIMEOUT_SEC.
nfrs.rationale: FM.12 rpn=6 — single-provider dependency causes availability breach during outage windows.

nfrs.text: The system shall encrypt every data flow marked encryption_at_rest_required=true at rest using the class declared in ENCRYPTION_CLASS and in transit using TLS-1.3 for every flow marked encryption_in_transit_required=true.
nfrs.rationale: DE.02 (sensitive pii), DE.07 (sensitive pii), and 13 other DEs carry encryption-required flags; consolidates CC.R04 baseline into an NFR with data-flow provenance.

nfrs.text: The system shall treat every payload in Session Token (DE.12) as direct PII and apply the direct-PII handling profile (redaction in logs, restricted audit field set).
nfrs.rationale: DE.12 pii_class=direct is the only direct-PII flow in scope; warrants its own handling profile distinct from indirect-PII flows.

nfrs.text: The system shall retain every Audit Event (DE.11) for at least AUDIT_RETENTION_DAYS before archival or deletion.
nfrs.rationale: DE.11 criticality=critical + regulatory union (SOC2/HIPAA/GDPR/PCI-DSS). 7-year retention satisfies widest framework (HIPAA 6yr rounded).

nfrs.text: The system shall present the first intake question to the Founder within FOUNDER_INTAKE_RESPONSE_BUDGET_MS of receiving DE.01.
nfrs.rationale: UC01.R04 carries a numeric latency budget — promoted to NFR with performance class.

nfrs.text: The system shall complete the spec generation cycle within SPEC_GENERATION_TIMEOUT_SEC from the first Founder answer.
nfrs.rationale: UC01.R12 numeric timeout — FR budget implies a performance NFR.

nfrs.text: The system shall render the review queue within REVIEW_QUEUE_LOAD_BUDGET_MS and the loaded spec bundle within SPEC_RENDER_BUDGET_MS.
nfrs.rationale: UC03.R03 + UC03.R06 are paired render budgets for the reviewer UI surface.

nfrs.text: The system shall complete state transitions within STATE_TRANSITION_BUDGET_MS.
nfrs.rationale: UC03.R09 numeric budget. Single-source empirical (industry p95 sync write) — promotable to Final.

nfrs.text: The system shall complete CLI bundle generation within CLI_EMISSION_TIMEOUT_SEC.
nfrs.rationale: UC04.R10 numeric ceiling — artifact generation SLO.

nfrs.text: The system shall deliver the ranked recommendation list within RECOMMENDATION_LATENCY_SEC of cycle start, capped at MAX_RECOMMENDATIONS_PER_CYCLE entries.
nfrs.rationale: UC06.R09 + UC06.R10 paired latency+capacity budgets.

nfrs.text: The system shall enforce traceback coverage of at least TRACEBACK_COVERAGE_PCT across all tech-stack recommendations and refuse to emit specs that do not meet that coverage.
nfrs.rationale: M1 hard-constraint — non-negotiable in v1. Status=Final.

nfrs.text: The system shall complete per-recommendation traceback within TRACEBACK_LATENCY_SEC.
nfrs.rationale: UC08.R14 per-item enrichment SLO.

nfrs.text: The system shall complete connection establishment within CONNECTION_ESTABLISHMENT_BUDGET_SEC.
nfrs.rationale: UC11.R14 onboarding-flow SLO.

nfrs.text: The system shall bound external-actor requests to RATE_LIMIT_RPM per authenticated actor per minute.
nfrs.rationale: CC.R06 cross-cutting rate-limit. Single-source production alignment with existing MCP rate limiter.

nfrs.text: The system shall emit structured logs at LOG_LEVEL_PROD and traces sampled at TRACE_SAMPLING_RATE for every action.
nfrs.rationale: CC.R09 cross-cutting observability. Configurable per-env via LOG_LEVEL_PROD.

coverage_notes: 26 NFRs: 12 FMEA-derived (1:1 with FM.01-FM.12), 3 data-flow-derived (encryption, direct-PII, audit retention), 11 FR-derived (numeric budgets).
Every entry carries derived_from with resolvable upstream ref.

Status=Final (13): FMEA-grounded compliance/security mitigations + M1 hard constraints (NFR.22 TRACEBACK_COVERAGE_PCT) + single-source empirical (NFR.19 STATE_TRANSITION_BUDGET_MS, NFR.25 RATE_LIMIT_RPM).
Status=Estimate (13): FR-derived performance budgets where value lacks regulatory/empirical single-source grounding; await Module 4 Decision Matrix tightening.
